'''Lenya''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Ryn/Legends|Ryn]] refugee on [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]]. She was one of [[Settlement 32]]'s communications operators.

==Appearances==
